iupac_generation_note: Systematic IUPAC-style name derived from the 12-primitive structural type. Each primitive value contributes specific IUPAC nomenclature features (stereodescriptors, ring system descriptors, substituents, topological descriptors). See diaschizic_iupac.py for the full mapping.
